# Tower Fan Reviews (towerfanreviews.uk)

> Independent UK tower fan reviews, comparisons and buying guides. We rate fans on published manufacturer specifications, verified owner reviews and running costs we calculate from rated wattage. We do not operate a test lab and do not claim our own airflow or decibel measurements. Editor: Sunny Patel. Funded by affiliate links; verdicts are independent.

## Best-of guides
- [Best tower fans UK](https://towerfanreviews.uk/best-tower-fans/): top-rated tower fans across all price points
- [Best bladeless tower fans](https://towerfanreviews.uk/best-bladeless-tower-fans/): sleek, child-safe, easy-clean picks
- [Best tower fan heaters](https://towerfanreviews.uk/best-tower-fan-heaters/): hot and cold fans for year-round use
- [Best quiet tower fans](https://towerfanreviews.uk/best-quiet-tower-fans/): whisper-quiet bedroom picks
- [Best tower fans with remote](https://towerfanreviews.uk/best-tower-fans-with-remote/)
- [Best mini tower fans](https://towerfanreviews.uk/best-mini-tower-fans/)
- [Best cheap tower fans](https://towerfanreviews.uk/best-cheap-tower-fans/)

- [Can you use a tower fan on its side?](https://towerfanreviews.uk/used-on-its-side/)
- [Why is my tower fan making a rattling noise?](https://towerfanreviews.uk/why-making-noise-rattling/)
- [How to clean a tower fan](https://towerfanreviews.uk/how-to-clean-a-tower-fan/)
- [Bladeless vs bladed tower fans](https://towerfanreviews.uk/bladeless-vs-bladed-tower-fans/)
- [Tower fan vs pedestal fan](https://towerfanreviews.uk/tower-fan-vs-pedestal-fan/)

- [Dyson](https://towerfanreviews.uk/dyson-tower-fans/), [Dreo](https://towerfanreviews.uk/dreo-tower-fans/), [Levoit](https://towerfanreviews.uk/levoit-tower-fans/), [Honeywell](https://towerfanreviews.uk/honeywell-tower-fans/), [Dimplex](https://towerfanreviews.uk/dimplex-tower-fans/), [Shark](https://towerfanreviews.uk/shark-tower-fans/), [Silvercrest](https://towerfanreviews.uk/silvercrest-tower-fans/)
